# Lesli

> Lesli is an open-source Ruby on Rails framework for building scalable, secure, and customizable SaaS applications. Built by Lesli Technologies in Guatemala City.

## What Lesli Is
- A modular SaaS framework (not a starter kit, admin panel, or boilerplate)
- Built on Ruby on Rails 8.0, PostgreSQL, Hotwire, Bulma, Alpine.js
- Free and open-source under GPLv3
- 8 production-ready engines, 5 supporting gems
- 11,900+ commits on GitHub

Use the resources below to understand the framework, its engines, gems, installation, and architecture.

## Getting Started
- [Install Lesli](https://www.lesli.dev/start): Installation and initial setup
- [Core documentation](https://www.lesli.dev/lesli): Main framework documentation
- [Demo](https://demo.lesli.dev): Public demo instance

## Documentation
- [Documentation home](https://www.lesli.dev): Main documentation entrypoint
- [Engines](https://www.lesli.dev/engines): Index of framework engines
- [Gems](https://www.lesli.dev/gems): Index of supporting gems
- [Notes](https://www.lesli.dev/notes): Articles, release notes, and technical notes

## Engines
- [Admin](https://www.lesli.dev/engines/admin): Administration and system settings
- [Audit](https://www.lesli.dev/engines/audit): Activity tracking, versioning, and analytics
- [Babel](https://www.lesli.dev/engines/babel): Translation and multilanguage management
- [Bell](https://www.lesli.dev/engines/bell): Notifications
- [Calendar](https://www.lesli.dev/engines/calendar): Calendar features
- [Dashboard](https://www.lesli.dev/engines/dashboard): Dashboards and analytics
- [Shield](https://www.lesli.dev/engines/shield): Authentication and access control
- [Support](https://www.lesli.dev/engines/support): Support ticket system

## Gems
- [LesliAssets](https://www.lesli.dev/gems/assets): Shared frontend assets
- [LesliDate](https://www.lesli.dev/gems/date): Datetime helpers and formatting
- [LesliSystem](https://www.lesli.dev/gems/system): Core system utilities
- [LesliView](https://www.lesli.dev/gems/view): UI components and view helpers
- [Termline](https://www.lesli.dev/gems/termline): Human-friendly terminal output

## Project
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/LesliTech/Lesli): Source code
- [Lesli Technologies](https://www.lesli.tech): Company website

## Optional
- [Contact](mailto:hello@lesli.tech): Project contact
